description: Default one-step weakening operators. A run freezes a finite subset; future operators may reopen any rung.

operators.description: Remove a primitive symbol, relation, carrier feature, or law and retest the obligation.
Apply a forgetful map from a richer presentation to a poorer presentation.
Merge presentation marks that current admissible tests do not distinguish.
Remove update operations, generators, or compositions not needed by the current obligation.
Shorten or erase stored history and test whether persistence or N01 remains load-bearing.
Use a coarser finite distinction partition or smaller finite capacity.
Remove sites, adjacency, locality radius, homogeneity, or clock structure where the obligation survives.
Replace the carrier with a non-isomorphic finite presentation reproducing the same tested distinction behavior.
Replace an algebra by a proper subalgebra, real form, semigroup, partial algebra, or non-algebraic table.
Replace a quotient/equivalence object with the underlying partial, contextual distinction relation.
Replace separate entropy and geometry states with one constrained-distinguishability surface when possible.

reopen_rule: Adding an operator or rival family invalidates any claim of exhaustive minimality outside the earlier frozen grammar.
